---
title: "Class Schedule"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
---

Spring 2026 class schedule.

VERY preliminary at this stage. Subject to change up to course start date.

## Schedule

| Day | Date | Meeting Location | Field Activity | Readings/Assignment |
|----|----|----|----|----|
| Wednesday | May 20, 2026 | Hagen 410 | Field equipment basics; urban birds |  |
| Thursday | May 21, 2026 | Hagen 410 | Migrant songbirds; Red River parks | Bird ID chapters 1-4 |
| Friday | May 22, 2026 | Hagen 410 | Migrant songbirds; Forest River and Orchard Glen Parks, Fargo | Bird ID chapters 5-8 |
| Monday | May 25, 2026 (Memorial Day - No Class) |  |  | Bird ID chapters 9-12 |
| Tuesday | May 26, 2026 | Hagen 410 | Shorebirds and waterfowl; Fargo treatment ponds, American Crystal Sugar plant |  |
| Wednesday | May 27, 2026 | RSC | Breeding forest and grassland birds; walking RSC |  |
| Thursday | May 28, 2026 | RSC | Breeding forest and grassland birds; walking Buffalo River State Park |  |
| Friday | May 29, 2026 | RSC | Prairie chickens |  |
| Monday | June 1, 2026 | RSC | Point count methodology | Bird vocalizations |
| Tuesday | June 2, 2026 | RSC | Grassland bird specialists; prairie-chickens; Bluestem or Felton Prairies | Survey methods |
| Wednesday | June 3, 2026 | RSC | Nest searching |  |
| Thursday | June 4, 2026 | RSC | Bird banding |  |
| Friday | June 5, 2026 | RSC | TBD |  |
| Monday | June 8, 2026 | RSC | Eastern forest birds; Tamarack National Wildlife Refuge |  |
| Tuesday | June 9, 2026 | Hagen 410 | Waterfowl; North Ottawa Impoundment |  |
| Wednesday | June 10, 2026 | RSC | Review day / Field Skills Assessment |  |
